scripts.build:text-prompt: npm run clean:bundle && npx webpack --config webpack.config.js --env entry=./lambdas/guidex-text-prompt-lambda.mjs --env outputFilename=guidex-text-prompt-lambda.js && zip -j -r lambda-function.zip dist/*.js
scripts.build:image-annotation: npm run clean:bundle && npx webpack --config webpack.config.js --env entry=./lambdas/guidex-image-annotation-lambda.mjs --env outputFilename=guidex-image-annotation-lambda.js && zip -j -r lambda-function.zip dist/*.js
scripts.build:image-recognition: npm run clean:bundle && npx webpack --config webpack.config.js --env entry=./lambdas/guidex-image-recognition-lambda.mjs --env outputFilename=guidex-image-recognition-lambda.js && zip -j -r lambda-function.zip dist/*.js
scripts.build:text-to-speech: npm run clean:bundle && npx webpack --config webpack.config.js --env entry=./lambdas/guidex-text-to-speech-lambda.mjs --env outputFilename=guidex-text-to-speech-lambda.js && zip -j -r lambda-function.zip dist/*.js
scripts.deploy:text-prompt: npm run build:text-prompt && npm run push:text-prompt
scripts.deploy:image-annotation: npm run build:image-annotation && npm run push:image-annotation
scripts.deploy:image-recognition: npm run build:image-recognition && npm run push:image-recognition
scripts.deploy:text-to-speech: npm run build:text-to-speech && npm run push:text-to-speech
